name: asg-content-system
description: ASG内容系统 - 基于AI驱动的内容管理和发布平台

scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:reset: psql -h localhost -U postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS asg_content;" && psql -h localhost -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE asg_content;" && npm run db:migrate

author: ASG
